headline: AI went totally unhinged this week — GPT-5.4 dropped w/ 1M context, Claude hit 1B users, Meta delays Avocado, & OpenAI signed a Pentagon deal that's got everyone spiraling

stories.title: OpenAI Retires GPT-5.1, Ships GPT-5.4 With 1.05M Token Context
stories.summary: OpenAI killed off GPT-5.1 models on Mar 11 and dropped GPT-5.4 early March with 1.05M token context (their biggest window ever), 33% fewer factual errors on individual claims, and a new Tool Search feature that cuts costs for systems with tons of tools. Lowkey the context window alone is crazy.
stories.takeaway: GPT-5.4 is the most capable frontier model for professional work rn, fr. The 1M+ context changes everything for processing entire codebases & long documents at once.

stories.title: Anthropic's Claude Hits 1B Users, Pushes 1M Context for Opus 4.6 on All Plans
stories.summary: Claude reached 1 billion monthly active users in Q1 2025 (fastest AI platform growth ever), and Anthropic rolled out 1M token context for Opus 4.6 on Max/Team/Enterprise plans. Also launched Partner Network with $100M commitment to help orgs actually deploy Claude.
stories.takeaway: Claude's becoming the default for enterprises tbh. The 1B user milestone + context expansion + enterprise support signals Anthropic's not just competing, they're winning on adoption.

stories.title: Meta Delays Avocado to May 2026 Over Performance Concerns; Internally Eyeing Google Gemini License
stories.summary: Meta pushed back its flagship Avocado LLM release from mid-March to at least May after internal testing showed performance inconsistencies. Reports suggest Meta even discussed temporarily licensing Google Gemini while Avocado gets refined—total L for their AI timeline.
stories.takeaway: Meta's struggling to keep pace. A delay this big + considering borrowing a competitor's model signals real pressure in the AI arms race.

stories.title: Alibaba Qwen 3.5 Small Series: 9B Model Matches 120B GPT at a Fraction the Cost
stories.summary: Alibaba dropped Qwen 3.5 Small on Mar 1 with a 9B model that matches GPT-OSS-120B on benchmarks (GPQA Diamond: 81.7 vs 71.5) & runs on iPhones in airplane mode. The 2B version hits 4GB RAM. Literally efficiency mode unlocked.
stories.takeaway: The era of 'bigger = better' is officially dead. Small language models that outperform giants on specific tasks are the vibe now.

watchNext.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini AI for Science: DOE Partnership & AlphaEvolve for Algorithm Design
watchNext.why: DeepMind's pitching AI as a scientific co-scientist for the DOE's Genesis Mission. AlphaEvolve coding agent + continuous learning in 2026 = AI that actually accelerates discovery, not just chat.

watchNext.title: Anthropic's Claude Partner Network & Enterprise Push: $100M Investment in 2026
watchNext.why: The big move from 'cool AI model' to 'actual enterprise infrastructure.' Claude certified architects, dedicated support, co-marketing—Anthropic's playing the long game to lock in customers before OpenAI's Pentagon deal gets bigger.
